title: Runtime/CI alignment baseline and command standardization
acceptance_criteria: Dependency/runtime drift between requirements files is resolved or explicitly documented in a canonical lock strategy
A single canonical backend validation command set is documented and used by CI and local commit gates
Commit gate checklist is fully satisfied before commit
commit_gate: Run targeted validation command and confirm zero failures
Run full backend unit/integration command and confirm zero failures
Run KPI suite command and confirm zero failures
Ensure changed files are limited to runtime/CI alignment scope
Attach command outputs to task completion summary before commit
completion_summary: Completed runtime/CI alignment: CI Python updated to 3.12 for backend jobs, duplicate drift requirement files removed, canonical runtime/validation report added at docs/scholarai/BACKEND_MATURITY_RUNTIME_CI_ALIGNMENT.md. Validation passed: targeted 3 passed; full backend 88 passed; KPI suite 23 passed.
